title: adenandra villosa subsp. umbellata
intro: Adenandra villosa subsp. umbellata is a plant species commonly known as the 'Umbellate Adenandra' or 'False Olive', which belongs to the Rutaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Adenandra villosa subsp. umbellata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are typically used for their therapeutic properties.
